drl:
rule "R0"
agenda-group "gb"
when
    T0(f2 != true, f0 >= -1000000007, $b0_0_0 : f0)
    T1(f1 > 3.0, f0 == "beta", f1 != $b0_0_0)
    T0(f2 != true)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -4
when
    T1(f0 matches "p(b|b)+zz?", $b1_0_0 : f0)
then
end
rule "R2"
when
    ( T0(f1 >= 3.0, f0 != 8) )
    or
    ( T0(f0 > 8, f0 != 8) )
then
    insert(new T1("ab", 2.5));
end
rule "R3"
no-loop
when
    $p3_0 : T0(f2 == true, f2 != false, $b3_0_0 : f0, $b3_0_1 : f0)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insert(new T1("zz", $p3_0.getF1()));
    insert(new T1("zz", 5.0));
end
rule "R4"
agenda-group "ga"
when
    T1($b4_0_0 : f0, $b4_0_1 : f1)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
name: fz_9004_2165
